mnemonics.title: Pipe FD Remember
mnemonics.content: PIPE FD: Pipe Returns Two Ends - Read (0) and Write (1). Father Does: Dad (parent) writes (1), Child reads (0).

mnemonics.title: FIFO vs Pipe Difference
mnemonics.content: FIFO: Filesystem, Independent processes, Forever (persistent), Open to all. Pipe: Private, Immediate family only, Ephemeral.
